// Survey Services

Full Scope Surveying & Modelling

LOD 200
01

Standard Scan-to-BIM

Point cloud capture plus Revit model for architects, fit-out designers and contractors.

  • On-site scanning (2–4 hrs)
  • Revit model LOD 200–250
  • Floor plans, sections, elevations
  • E57 / RCP file included
LOD 200
LOD 300
02

MEP & Structural As-Built

Detailed LOD 300 survey — MEP and structural elements for coordination.

  • MEP pipework, ductwork, cable trays
  • Structural elements modelled
  • Ready for ACC / Navisworks
  • Annotated coordination output
LOD 300
Heritage
03

Heritage & Listed Building Survey

High-precision documentation for Grade II+ buildings and planning applications.

  • Sub-millimetre precision
  • Measured building drawings
  • Planning consent-ready pack
  • HBIM model setup available
High precision
Retrofit
04

Retrofit Planning Survey

As-built data for retrofit projects where old drawings are inaccurate or missing.

  • Same-week mobilisation
  • Existing conditions model
  • Zone mapping and clash risk areas
  • Direct handoff to design team
Retrofit-ready
Digital Twin
06

Digital Twin Setup

Point cloud capture through to FM-ready digital twin — complete pipeline.

  • Point cloud → Revit → FM platform
  • COBie data and asset embedding
  • Dalux / Autodesk Tandem
  • Document linking to elements
Point cloud → Digital twin
Post-Processing
07

Post-Processing Only

Already have scans? We convert your point cloud to Revit or CAD. Capacity partner for survey firms.

  • Accepts E57, LAS, LAZ, RCP, PTX
  • Revit modelling from your scan
  • 2D CAD extraction
  • From 3 working days
Your scans → our modelling
